message:
feat(database): add error classification methods across all backends

Implement is_transient, is_connection_error, is_retryable, is_constraint_violation,
and error_code methods for PostgreSQL (extend existing), MySQL (new impl block),
and SQLite (new impl block). Closes ERR-G1 and ERR-G2 gaps from T6.9 contracts.
Update contract JSON artifacts and tests to reflect implemented status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
